_comment: Test fixture products. Add entries here to build up the regression suite. Each entry is imported directly into the product library (bypassing the scraper) and then model generation is triggered as normal. Fields match the store product shape.

_fields.name: string — full product name
_fields.category: string — must match a CATEGORY_OPTIONS value
_fields.url: string | null — original product page (for reference only)
_fields.imageUrl: string | null — direct image URL used for AI model generation

products.name: SÖDERHAMN Armchair
products._notes: Low-profile modern armchair. Good baseline — simple silhouette, prominent seat cushion.

products.name: KALLAX Shelf Unit 4x4
products._notes: Grid shelving — tests whether AI generates open compartments vs solid box.

products.name: LACK Side Table
products._notes: Tiny low table. Tests small-item placeholder visibility and leg detail.

products.name: HEKTAR Floor Lamp
products._notes: Tall narrow item — tests aspect ratio extremes and bounding box accuracy.

products.name: KIVIK 3-seat Sofa
products._notes: Wide sofa — tests large footprint items and multi-cushion upholstery.

products.name: LISABO Dining Table
products._notes: Rectangular table — tests standard table-top + leg geometry.

products.name: FRIHETEN Sleeper Sectional
products._notes: L-shaped sectional — hardest case for bounding box compliance.
